initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT 
    i_item_id,
    i_item_desc,
    s_state,
    COUNT(ss_quantity) AS ss_quantity_count,
    AVG(ss_quantity) AS ss_quantity_avg,
    STDDEV(ss_quantity) AS ss_quantity_stddev,
    COVAR_POP(ss_quantity, sr_return_quantity) AS ss_sr_cov,
    COUNT(sr_return_quantity) AS sr_quantity_count,
    AVG(sr_return_quantity) AS sr_quantity_avg,
    STDDEV(sr_return_quantity) AS sr_quantity_stddev,
    COUNT(cs_quantity) AS cs_quantity_count,
    AVG(cs_quantity) AS cs_quantity_avg,
    STDDEV(cs_quantity) AS cs_quantity_stddev
FROM store_sales
JOIN date_dim d1 ON ss_sold_date_sk = d1.d_date_sk
JOIN store ON ss_store_sk = s_store_sk
JOIN item ON ss_item_sk = i_item_sk
JOIN store_returns 
    ON ss_customer_sk = sr_customer_sk 
    AND ss_item_sk = sr_item_sk 
    AND ss_ticket_number = sr_ticket_number
JOIN date_dim d2 ON sr_returned_date_sk = d2.d_date_sk
JOIN catalog_sales 
    ON cs_ship_customer_sk = sr_customer_sk 
    AND cs_item_sk = sr_item_sk
JOIN date_dim d3 ON cs_sold_date_sk = d3.d_date_sk
WHERE 
    d1.d_year = 2001 
    AND d1.d_quarter_name = 'Q1'
    AND d2.d_year = 2001 
    AND d2.d_quarter_name IN ('Q1', 'Q2', 'Q3')
    AND d3.d_year = 2001 
    AND d3.d_quarter_name IN ('Q1', 'Q2', 'Q3')
GROUP BY i_item_id, i_item_desc, s_state
ORDER BY i_item_id ASC, i_item_desc ASC, s_state ASC
LIMIT 100;

SELECT 
    i_item_id,
    i_item_desc,
    s_state,
    COUNT(ss_quantity) AS ss_quantity_count,
    AVG(ss_quantity) AS ss_quantity_avg,
    STDDEV(ss_quantity) AS ss_quantity_stddev,
    COVAR_POP(ss_quantity, sr_return_quantity) AS ss_sr_cov,
    COUNT(sr_return_quantity) AS sr_return_quantity_count,
    AVG(sr_return_quantity) AS sr_return_quantity_avg,
    STDDEV(sr_return_quantity) AS sr_return_quantity_stddev,
    COUNT(cs_quantity) AS cs_quantity_count,
    AVG(cs_quantity) AS cs_quantity_avg,
    STDDEV(cs_quantity) AS cs_quantity_stddev
FROM 
    store_sales,
    store_returns,
    catalog_sales,
    date_dim d1,
    date_dim d2,
    date_dim d3,
    store,
    item
WHERE 
    ss_sold_date_sk = d1.d_date_sk
    AND ss_item_sk = i_item_sk
    AND ss_store_sk = s_store_sk
    AND ss_customer_sk = sr_customer_sk
    AND ss_item_sk = sr_item_sk
    AND ss_ticket_number = sr_ticket_number
    AND sr_returned_date_sk = d2.d_date_sk
    AND cs_sold_date_sk = d3.d_date_sk
    AND cs_item_sk = i_item_sk
    AND cs_ship_customer_sk = sr_customer_sk
    AND d1.d_year = 2001
    AND d1.d_quarter_name = 'Q1'
    AND d2.d_year = 2001
    AND d2.d_quarter_name IN ('Q1', 'Q2', 'Q3')
    AND d3.d_year = 2001
    AND d3.d_quarter_name IN ('Q1', 'Q2', 'Q3')
GROUP BY 
    i_item_id,
    i_item_desc,
    s_state
ORDER BY 
    i_item_id ASC,
    i_item_desc ASC,
    s_state ASC
LIMIT 100;

SELECT 
    i_item_id,
    i_item_desc,
    s_state,
    COUNT(ss_quantity) AS ss_quantity_count,
    AVG(ss_quantity) AS ss_quantity_avg,
    STDDEV(ss_quantity) AS ss_quantity_stddev,
    COVAR_POP(ss_quantity, sr_return_quantity) AS ss_sr_cov,
    COUNT(sr_return_quantity) AS sr_quantity_count,
    AVG(sr_return_quantity) AS sr_quantity_avg,
    STDDEV(sr_return_quantity) AS sr_quantity_stddev,
    COUNT(cs_quantity) AS cs_quantity_count,
    AVG(cs_quantity) AS cs_quantity_avg,
    STDDEV(cs_quantity) AS cs_quantity_stddev
FROM 
    store_sales
    JOIN store_returns ON ss_customer_sk = sr_customer_sk 
                       AND ss_item_sk = sr_item_sk 
                       AND ss_ticket_number = sr_ticket_number
    JOIN catalog_sales ON sr_customer_sk = cs_ship_customer_sk 
                       AND sr_item_sk = cs_item_sk
    JOIN date_dim d1 ON ss_sold_date_sk = d1.d_date_sk
    JOIN date_dim d2 ON sr_returned_date_sk = d2.d_date_sk
    JOIN date_dim d3 ON cs_sold_date_sk = d3.d_date_sk
    JOIN store ON ss_store_sk = s_store_sk
    JOIN item ON ss_item_sk = i_item_sk
WHERE 
    d1.d_year = 2001 
    AND d1.d_quarter_name = 'Q1'
    AND d2.d_year = 2001 
    AND d2.d_quarter_name IN ('Q1', 'Q2', 'Q3')
    AND d3.d_year = 2001 
    AND d3.d_quarter_name IN ('Q1', 'Q2', 'Q3')
GROUP BY 
    i_item_id, i_item_desc, s_state
ORDER BY 
    i_item_id ASC, i_item_desc ASC, s_state ASC
LIMIT 100;

SELECT 
    i_item_id,
    i_item_desc,
    s_state,
    COUNT(ss_quantity) AS ss_quantity_count,
    AVG(ss_quantity) AS ss_quantity_avg,
    STDDEV(ss_quantity) AS ss_quantity_stddev,
    COVAR_POP(ss_quantity, sr_return_quantity) AS ss_sr_cov,
    COUNT(sr_return_quantity) AS sr_return_quantity_count,
    AVG(sr_return_quantity) AS sr_return_quantity_avg,
    STDDEV(sr_return_quantity) AS sr_return_quantity_stddev,
    COUNT(cs_quantity) AS cs_quantity_count,
    AVG(cs_quantity) AS cs_quantity_avg,
    STDDEV(cs_quantity) AS cs_quantity_stddev
FROM 
    store_sales
    JOIN date_dim d1 ON store_sales.ss_sold_date_sk = d1.d_date_sk
    JOIN item ON store_sales.ss_item_sk = item.i_item_sk
    JOIN store ON store_sales.ss_store_sk = store.s_store_sk
    JOIN store_returns ON store_sales.ss_customer_sk = store_returns.sr_customer_sk
        AND store_sales.ss_item_sk = store_returns.sr_item_sk
        AND store_sales.ss_ticket_number = store_returns.sr_ticket_number
    JOIN date_dim d2 ON store_returns.sr_returned_date_sk = d2.d_date_sk
    JOIN catalog_sales ON store_returns.sr_customer_sk = catalog_sales.cs_ship_customer_sk
        AND store_returns.sr_item_sk = catalog_sales.cs_item_sk
    JOIN date_dim d3 ON catalog_sales.cs_sold_date_sk = d3.d_date_sk
WHERE 
    d1.d_year = 2001
    AND d1.d_quarter_name = 'Q1'
    AND d2.d_year = 2001
    AND d2.d_quarter_name IN ('Q1', 'Q2', 'Q3')
    AND d3.d_year = 2001
    AND d3.d_quarter_name IN ('Q1', 'Q2', 'Q3')
GROUP BY 
    i_item_id, i_item_desc, s_state
ORDER BY 
    i_item_id ASC, i_item_desc ASC, s_state ASC
LIMIT 100;

SELECT 
    i_item_id,
    i_item_desc,
    s_state,
    COUNT(ss_quantity) AS ss_quantity_count,
    AVG(ss_quantity) AS ss_quantity_avg,
    STDDEV(ss_quantity) AS ss_quantity_stddev,
    COVAR_POP(ss_quantity, sr_return_quantity) AS ss_sr_cov,
    COUNT(sr_return_quantity) AS sr_return_quantity_count,
    AVG(sr_return_quantity) AS sr_return_quantity_avg,
    STDDEV(sr_return_quantity) AS sr_return_quantity_stddev,
    COUNT(cs_quantity) AS cs_quantity_count,
    AVG(cs_quantity) AS cs_quantity_avg,
    STDDEV(cs_quantity) AS cs_quantity_stddev
FROM 
    store_sales,
    store_returns,
    catalog_sales,
    date_dim d1,
    date_dim d2,
    date_dim d3,
    store,
    item
WHERE 
    ss_sold_date_sk = d1.d_date_sk
    AND ss_item_sk = i_item_sk
    AND ss_store_sk = s_store_sk
    AND ss_customer_sk = sr_customer_sk
    AND ss_item_sk = sr_item_sk
    AND ss_ticket_number = sr_ticket_number
    AND sr_returned_date_sk = d2.d_date_sk
    AND cs_sold_date_sk = d3.d_date_sk
    AND cs_item_sk = i_item_sk
    AND cs_ship_customer_sk = sr_customer_sk
    AND d1.d_year = 2001
    AND d1.d_quarter_name = 'Q1'
    AND d2.d_year = 2001
    AND d2.d_quarter_name IN ('Q1', 'Q2', 'Q3')
    AND d3.d_year = 2001
    AND d3.d_quarter_name IN ('Q1', 'Q2', 'Q3')
GROUP BY 
    i_item_id,
    i_item_desc,
    s_state
ORDER BY 
    i_item_id ASC,
    i_item_desc ASC,
    s_state ASC
LIMIT 100;

SELECT 
    i_item_id,
    i_item_desc,
    s_state,
    COUNT(ss_quantity) AS ss_quantity_count,
    AVG(ss_quantity) AS ss_quantity_avg,
    STDDEV(ss_quantity) AS ss_quantity_stddev,
    COVAR_POP(ss_quantity, sr_return_quantity) AS ss_sr_cov,
    COUNT(sr_return_quantity) AS sr_return_quantity_count,
    AVG(sr_return_quantity) AS sr_return_quantity_avg,
    STDDEV(sr_return_quantity) AS sr_return_quantity_stddev,
    COUNT(cs_quantity) AS cs_quantity_count,
    AVG(cs_quantity) AS cs_quantity_avg,
    STDDEV(cs_quantity) AS cs_quantity_stddev
FROM 
    store_sales
    JOIN date_dim d1 ON store_sales.ss_sold_date_sk = d1.d_date_sk
    JOIN item ON store_sales.ss_item_sk = item.i_item_sk
    JOIN store ON store_sales.ss_store_sk = store.s_store_sk
    JOIN store_returns ON store_sales.ss_customer_sk = store_returns.sr_customer_sk
        AND store_sales.ss_item_sk = store_returns.sr_item_sk
        AND store_sales.ss_ticket_number = store_returns.sr_ticket_number
    JOIN date_dim d2 ON store_returns.sr_returned_date_sk = d2.d_date_sk
    JOIN catalog_sales ON store_returns.sr_customer_sk = catalog_sales.cs_ship_customer_sk
        AND store_returns.sr_item_sk = catalog_sales.cs_item_sk
    JOIN date_dim d3 ON catalog_sales.cs_sold_date_sk = d3.d_date_sk
WHERE 
    d1.d_year = 2001
    AND d1.d_quarter_name = 'Q1'
    AND d2.d_year = 2001
    AND d2.d_quarter_name IN ('Q1', 'Q2', 'Q3')
    AND d3.d_year = 2001
    AND d3.d_quarter_name IN ('Q1', 'Q2', 'Q3')

    i_item_id, i_item_desc, s_state
ORDER BY 
    i_item_id ASC, i_item_desc ASC, s_state ASC
LIMIT 100;
